projects.title: AEGIS RAG Security Lab
projects.summary: Secure RAG architecture lab focused on retrieval design, prompt injection risk, governance, monitoring, and adversarial evaluation.

projects.title: Ed-ready Architecture Work
projects.summary: Cloud-backed educational lab infrastructure and documentation alignment work focused on onboarding, stack comprehension, and architecture clarity.

projects.title: Personal Site Build Log
projects.summary: The site itself as a proof of workflow: branch discipline, content architecture, dynamic data loading, and iterative delivery.

projects.title: PhishGuard AI
projects.summary: Archived capstone project: an AI-assisted email phishing filter with manual .eml analysis, IMAP mailbox scanning, evidence extraction, triage scoring, review/quarantine routing, and JSONL audit logging.

projects.title: Reverse Engineering & Analysis Labs
projects.summary: Archived lab series covering static and dynamic analysis, reverse engineering workflow, behavioral observation, indicator extraction, and professional reporting using Flare VM and Ghidra.

projects.title: Application Security Labs
projects.summary: Hands-on application security work covering SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, fuzzing, Burp Suite workflows, exploit validation, and defensive explanation.

projects.title: Digital Forensics Workbench
projects.summary: Forensic analysis notes from VHD and IMG investigations using Autopsy, Sleuth Kit, Flare VM, evidence timelines, artifacts, and reporting discipline.
